SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractOrasakaEngine
Core Orchestration Engine for the Orasaka CORS library.
AiController
GraphQL Controller that exposes the Orasaka AI capabilities as queries, mutations, and subscriptions.
CachingToolCallback
A caching decorator for ToolCallback.
ChatStreamController
REST controller exposing real-time Server-Sent Events (SSE) chat streaming and authentication endpoints.
ChatStreamService
Service orchestrating AI chat streaming flows for SSE and GraphQL subscriptions.
CoreProperties
Configuration properties for Orasaka CORS (Cognitive Orchestration invalid input: '&' Retrieval System).
CoreProperties.McpConfig
MCP (Model Context Protocol) configuration.
CoreProperties.ProviderConfig
Configuration for a specific AI provider.
CoreProperties.RagConfig
RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) configuration.
DefaultMcpOrchestrator
Default implementation for MCP Orchestrator.
DefaultOrasakaOptions
Default record implementation of the OrasakaOptions configuration interface.
DefaultOrasakaToolRegistry
Default implementation of OrasakaToolRegistry.
GatewayApplication
Entry point for the Orasaka Gateway Backend-for-Frontend (BFF) application.
GatewayProperties
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka gateway settings.
GatewayProperties.CorsProperties
CORS policy configuration properties.
IdentityConfig
Spring Configuration for the orasaka-identity module.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties
Configuration properties for passive generic identity workflows in Orasaka.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties.EmailVerification
Settings for the email verification subsystem.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties.Interceptions
Settings for the user interception engine.
IdentityJpaConfiguration
 
IdentityService
Core identity service responsible for user lifecycle management: profile resolution, self-service registration, preference persistence, password-based authentication, user interceptions, and token-based email verification.
LoginRequest
Immutable request payload for the POST /api/v1/auth/login endpoint.
McpOrchestrator
Orchestrator interface for MCP (Model Context Protocol).
OrasakaAiClient
High-level Facade for developers to interact with the Orasaka AI Ecosystem.
OrasakaAuthority
Represents a dynamic runtime authority or role assigned to a user session.
OrasakaAuthorityEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_authorities database table.
OrasakaAuthorityRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaAuthorityEntity.
OrasakaBackgroundScheduler
Scheduled background task processor for RAG ingestion pipelines.
OrasakaChatRequest
Unified chat request record for all AI interactions.
OrasakaChatRequest.ChatMessage
Represents an individual message in a chat history.
OrasakaChatResponse
Unified chat response record for all AI interactions.
OrasakaChunker
Interface representing a strategy to chunk raw data into Spring AI Document representations.
OrasakaChunkingStrategies
Pre-built, reusable chunking strategies library.
OrasakaContext
Immutable context for Orasaka AI requests.
OrasakaCoreConfiguration
Spring Configuration that wires environment-driven AI provider models into the Orasaka engine and registers all core service beans.
OrasakaEngine
Concrete, final implementation of AbstractOrasakaEngine.
OrasakaException
Base exception for the Orasaka CORS module.
OrasakaImageRequest
Unified image request record for multi-modal generation.
OrasakaImageResponse
Unified image response record.
OrasakaKnowledgeService
Service for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
OrasakaMcpService
Integration layer for MCP (Model Context Protocol).
OrasakaMemoryResolver
Thread-safe resolver for session-scoped ChatMemory instances.
OrasakaOptions
Unified options interface for Orasaka models.
OrasakaRateLimitTierEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_rate_limit_tiers database table.
OrasakaRateLimitTierRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaRateLimitTierEntity.
OrasakaSecurityFilter
Stateless security filter that authenticates each HTTP request using a Bearer token.
OrasakaSpeechRequest
Unified speech request record for Text-To-Speech generation.
OrasakaToolCacheEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_tools_cache database table.
OrasakaToolCacheId
Embeddable composite primary key class for OrasakaToolCacheEntity.
OrasakaToolCacheRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaToolCacheEntity.
OrasakaToolRagSourceEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_tools_rag_source database table.
OrasakaToolRagSourceRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaToolRagSourceEntity.
OrasakaToolRegistry
Registry interface for local Java methods to be used as tools by the AI models.
OrasakaToolsProperties
Configuration registry for Orasaka Tools, including caching and RAG ingestion properties.
OrasakaToolsProperties.CacheConfig
Configuration settings for caching tool execution results.
OrasakaToolsProperties.RagConfig
Configuration settings for RAG database ingestion for a specific tool.
OrasakaToolsProperties.ToolConfig
Configuration settings for a specific tool.
OrasakaUserEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_users database table.
OrasakaUserInterceptionEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_user_interceptions database table.
OrasakaUserInterceptionId
Embeddable composite primary key class for OrasakaUserInterceptionEntity.
OrasakaUserInterceptionRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaUserInterceptionEntity.
OrasakaUserRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaUserEntity.
OrasakaVerificationTokenEntity
JPA Entity mapping the orasaka_verification_tokens database table.
OrasakaVerificationTokenRepository
JPA Repository for performing database operations on OrasakaVerificationTokenEntity.
RateLimitConfig
Conditional configuration class for the dynamic rate limiting engine.
RateLimitFilter
Servlet filter enforcing dynamic rate limiting based on PostgreSQL tiers and Bucket4j/Lettuce Redis state.
RateLimitProperties
Configuration properties record for environment-driven Orasaka rate limiting settings.
RegisterRequest
Immutable request payload for the POST /api/v1/auth/register endpoint.
RegisterResult
GraphQL projection type for the register mutation.
Role
Domain-driven RBAC hierarchy using Java 21 Sealed Interfaces.
Role.Admin
Represents the Admin role in the system.
Role.Guest
Represents the Guest role in the system.
Role.User
Represents the User role in the system.
SecurityConfig
Stateless Spring Security configuration for the orasaka-gateway module.
ToolCacheService
Service managing multi-tier caching with Caffeine and PostgreSQL storage.
ToolCacheService.CacheEntry
Represents a cached response entry.
User
Immutable domain representation of an Orasaka user, carrying identity, security authorities, and multi-modal AI execution preferences.
UserRegisteredEvent
Event published when a new user registers in the Orasaka identity module.
VerificationController
Controller exposing REST endpoints for user account email verification.
VerificationController.VerifyTokenRequest
Request payload for verifying account tokens.
